name: uniapp-wotui-demo
description: UniApp + Wot UI + UnoCSS 小程序开发模版

scripts.dev:mp-weixin: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=development node scripts/build-config.js && uni --platform mp-weixin
scripts.dev:mp-weixin:test: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=test node scripts/build-config.js test && uni --platform mp-weixin --mode test
scripts.dev:mp-weixin:prod: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=production node scripts/build-config.js production && uni --platform mp-weixin --mode production
scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=production node scripts/build-config.js production && uni build --platform mp-weixin
scripts.build:mp-weixin:test: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=test node scripts/build-config.js test && uni build --platform mp-weixin --mode test
scripts.build:mp-weixin:prod: cross-env VITE_APP_ENV=production node scripts/build-config.js production && uni build --platform mp-weixin --mode production
